_label_note: KR Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered KR resident-number shorthand/KR-BRN anchors, checksum-valid RRN/business-registration positives, negated no-executed-term-sheet wording, and public/stale percentage prose. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference.

internal memo — issuer communications and compliance review for mohae dynamics co., ltd.
scope: investor-relations draft update, stale research notes, and board process checklist; korea jurisdiction; fscma and pipa compliance.
public-source baseline: refer to press release dated 2025-03-12 on our website and archived hanul exchange (hxk) announcement; nothing new beyond that.
hr files must not store resident-number; purge placeholders like 000000-0000000 and test ids like Z9-9999999.
marking protocol: do not add “non-public” headers unless content is truly internal; this draft relies on public data only.
ir draft remains under an internal embargo until 2026-10-15 09:00 KST; distribution limited to role mailboxes ir@mohae and legal@mohae.
note: the term sheet cited is the old version announced last year; no definitive agreement executed, and no live negotiations are described here.
mac/mae: the board asked for a summary; current draft includes a negated mac clause example for training: “no material adverse change has occurred since the audited 2024 accounts.”
deal checklist (generic form labels): counterparty name field, price field, percent field, and closing date field; leave values blank in templates.
project-management notes: update the tracker, lower-case headings, and move remaining tasks to next sprint; no sensitive fields in the shared sheet.
research notes are derivative of public analyst webinars and trade press; citations to “korea tech weekly” and “seoul capital journal” are public.
employment onboarding: verify consent under pipa; do not collect family info, bank account details, or face scans; use the public hr helpline portal.
investor-relations q&a: only use stale percentages from the 2024 annual report, e.g., r&d ratio approx 12% (already disclosed).
for mnpi screening, flag any live code names; none are used in this memo, and training examples should be obviously dummy.
